description:
Follow-up under sbdpi-swx.6.4 for the delegated worker retry flow after `beadwork_land_worker` reran review for runtime `sbdpi-5r5-mo11tiwj-u5ipl8` but blocked the UI for the full reviewer timeout and still surfaced a generic failure.

Scope:
- make explicit landing/review retries (`/bw land` / `beadwork_land_worker`) hand off asynchronously instead of blocking the operator session until validation/review completes
- expose truthful retry state transitions such as pending/running review/landing so operators can see that a retry is in progress
- ensure retry paths always create and append reviewer runtime artifacts/logs (`review.log`) just like the initial pass
- preserve and surface real timeout/signal/stderr failure details on retry, not just generic exit-code summaries
- add regression coverage for async retry behavior and retry-state/log semantics

Goal: retrying a blocked delegated landing should return control immediately while making the ongoing review/landing work observable and diagnosable.
title: Make /bw land retries asynchronous and truthfully observable
